title: taraxacum percurvatum
intro: Taraxacum percurvatum is a type of dandelion, specifically a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family native to China and other parts of Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Taraxacum percurvatum include reducing blood pressure, improving liver function, and supporting the immune system. Taraxacum percurvatum can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
